general: La ejecución de este viaje representa la aceptación del contrato general de prestación de servicio de DXT y sus anexos en el cual, además:(1) EL TRANSPORTISTA acuerda no solicitar fletes, aceptar ni proporcionar servicios de transporte (directa o indirectamente) desde o hacia cualquiera de los Clientes (o clientes de los clientes) de DXT Logistica SA de CV (DXT); (2) "Clientes de DXT" Significará cualquier remitente, destinatario, consignatario u otra parte para quien DXT haya organizado cualquier transporte de carga e incluye aquellas personas o entidades presentadas por primera vez o de las que el TRANSPORTISTA se enteró por parte de DXT. Si el TRANSPORTISTA viola los términos de este párrafo, DXT tendrá derecho a cobrar/recuperar el 25% del monto que DXT podria haber obtenido por los fletes de todos y cada uno del (los) cliente(s) implicados en un periodo de 12 meses. Además de lo anterior, DXT puede solicitar medidas cautelares y el TRANSPORTISTA será responsable de todos los costos y gastos incurridos por DXT, incluidos, entre otros, los honorarios razonables de los abogados.

dispatcher.notes: All PODs, invoices, and accessorial charge requests must be submitted to KILIAN LOGISTICS within 24 hours after completing a job. Tracking is mandatory for all shipments over 200 miles. If tracking is not accepted before pickup, the Carrier may be removed from the load. Any detention time at a shipper or receiver must be reported to Kilian at least 30 minutes before detention begins to allow time for customer approval. A time-stamped BOL is required to request detention compensation. Please forward it to your Kilian contact. Detention time starts after 3 hours. All claims must be settled within 30 days. Kilian reserves the right to deduct the claim amount from the Carrier's freight payment. By signing below, the Carrier affirms that it is legally qualified to provide the agreed-upon transportation services and holds liability insurance of at least $1,000,000 and cargo insurance of at least $100,000. POD must be received within 24 Hours, To receive payment, the Carrier must submit a signed POD and invoice. Payments are made within 30 days of receiving the necessary paperwork. Please send to Accounting@kilianlogistics.com. Double brokering is prohibited. If the Carrier re-brokers or double brokers a load, their freight payment will be voided, and they may be liable for damages to Kilian. Lumper receipts must be submitted within 24 hours for reimbursement. Please send them to your direct Kilian contact. In the event of missed appointment time $100 fine will be deducted from the agreed rate.

general: All drivers must count and verify the shipment before loading. If any discrepancies are found, the driver must contact Kilian before departing.

general: All drivers must count and verify the shipment before loading.

Tracking is mandatory for all shipments over 200 miles.
If tracking is not accepted before pickup, the Carrier may be removed from the load.
Any detention time at a shipper or receiver must be reported to Kilian at least 30 minutes before detention begins to allow time for customer approval.
A time-stamped BOL is required to request detention compensation.
Detention time starts after 3 hours.
Given the prevalence of fraud in the industry (such as email phishing, phone spoofing, etc.), we remind all carriers to verify any load changes directly with your designated Kilian contact.
All claims must be settled within 30 days.
Kilian reserves the right to deduct the claim amount from the Carrier's freight payment.

By signing below, the Carrier affirms that it is legally qualified to provide the agreed-upon transportation services and holds liability insurance of at least $1,000,000 and cargo insurance of at least $100,000.
POD must be received within 24 hours.
To receive payment, the Carrier must submit a signed POD and invoice.
Payments are made within 30 days of receiving the necessary paperwork.
Please send to Accounting@kilianlogistics.com.
Double brokering is prohibited.
If the Carrier re-brokers or double brokers a load, their freight payment will be voided, and they may be liable for damages to Kilian.
Lumper receipts must be submitted within 24 hours for reimbursement.
Please send them to your direct Kilian contact.
In the event of missed appointment time $100 fine will be deducted from the agreed rate.
